{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Silent King's madra
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King's madra]] produces a disturbing white light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
